title: Evaluate homepage preview and reach Getting Started docs
description: Verifies a prospective user can see the live KnowledgeGraph preview on the homepage and reach the Getting Started documentation via the primary conversion path.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero area to finish rendering
Click the Get Started action
Verify the user lands on the getting started docs page
Verify installation and usage guidance content is displayed

title: Docs index redirects to Getting Started
description: Verifies navigating to the docs root route redirects the user into the Getting Started documentation page.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs
Verify the user lands on the getting started docs page
Verify installation and usage guidance content is displayed

title: Homepage renders in dark theme by default
description: Verifies that the homepage loads with dark theme applied automatically on first render.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Homepage KnowledgeGraph preview renders without crashing
description: Verifies the homepage hero KnowledgeGraph preview renders from static sample data without errors and remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero graph preview to render
Verify a knowledge graph visualization is displayed in the hero preview
Verify the page remains interactive without a crash overlay

title: Demo page renders in dark theme by default
description: Verifies that the demo playground loads with dark theme applied automatically.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Docs Getting Started renders in dark theme by default
description: Verifies that the Getting Started documentation page loads with dark theme applied automatically.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/getting-started
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Switch layouts across all modes without losing interactivity
description: Verifies a user can switch between force, radial, arc, and chord layouts and the graph updates each time without becoming unresponsive.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Select the force layout
Select the radial layout
Select the arc layout
Select the chord layout
Verify the graph visualization updates after the final layout switch and remains interactive

title: Force layout renders and settles in demo
description: Verifies switching to the force layout in the demo updates the graph and reaches a stable interactive state.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Select the force layout
Wait for the graph to settle after the layout change
Verify the graph visualization updates to the selected layout and remains interactive

title: Select a node updates the selected node panel
description: Verifies clicking a node in the demo selects it and updates the selected-node inspection panel with that node’s details.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Click a node in the graph visualization
Verify the selected node panel updates to show details for a selected node

title: Export PNG downloads a graph snapshot
description: Verifies exporting the current demo graph creates a PNG file download representing the current visualization state.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Select a layout different from the default
Click the export PNG action
Verify a PNG file download is initiated

title: Toggle tooltip fields changes tooltip content
description: Verifies toggling node/edge/metadata tooltip options changes what information appears in tooltips when hovering graph elements.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Toggle off at least one node tooltip field
Move the pointer over a node to show its tooltip
Toggle on a metadata key for tooltips
Move the pointer over a node to show its tooltip again
Verify the tooltip content changes to reflect the current tooltip field toggles

title: Dark theme persists when navigating from homepage to demo
description: Verifies that dark theme remains applied when the user navigates from the homepage to the demo page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the demo playground
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Filter or highlight nodes by selecting a group chip
description: Verifies selecting a node group chip changes the graph display to filter or highlight nodes belonging to that group.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Click a node group chip
Verify the graph display changes to reflect the selected group filtering or highlighting

title: Dark theme persists when navigating between docs pages
description: Verifies that dark theme remains applied while navigating within the docs section from Getting Started to API Reference.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/getting-started
Click the navigation item to open the API reference docs page
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Navigate docs via sidebar from Getting Started to API Reference
description: Verifies a documentation reader can use the sidebar to navigate from Getting Started to API Reference and see prop documentation.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/getting-started
Click the sidebar navigation item for the API reference
Verify the user lands on the API reference docs page
Verify component prop documentation is displayed

title: Read examples and copy a code snippet
description: Verifies a reader can open the Examples documentation and copy an embedded code snippet with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/examples
Scroll to an example code block
Click the copy control for the code snippet
Verify a copy confirmation is visible

title: Copy install command from homepage
description: Verifies a user can copy the install command from the homepage terminal control and receives a visible confirmation that copy occurred.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the install command section
Click the copy-to-clipboard control for the install command
Verify a copy confirmation is visible

title: Jump to an API Reference section using in-page table of contents
description: Verifies a reader can use the API Reference table of contents to jump to a specific section within the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/api-reference
Click a table-of-contents link for a section on the page
Verify the page scrolls to the corresponding API reference section

title: Open GitHub repository from homepage
description: Verifies a user can open the repository from the homepage and the destination loads in a new tab/window.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the action that opens the project repository
Verify a new tab or window opens with an external site loaded

title: Open changelog and view version history
description: Verifies a reader can open the Changelog page and see release notes content.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/changelog
Verify release notes and version history content is displayed

title: Homepage parallax responds to pointer movement
description: Verifies the homepage hero visual responds to pointer movement with parallax motion feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the pointer across the hero visual area
Verify the hero visual shows parallax motion feedback
